spec.name: Shockcone
spec.summary: Unleashes a wide cone of electric energy that jolts and temporarily paralyzes anything caught within its path.
spec.effect_description: Unleashes a wide cone of electric energy that jolts and temporarily paralyzes anything caught within its path.
